sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91692" key="puri/kaoi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρί-καοι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n91692.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fire-burners</tr_>, of the Delphians, Orac. ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.406e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
